Action: Business Verifier creates an unsigned verification request with DCQL and encryption; Wallet retrieves unsigned request object from verifier
Data:
- Accepted issuer DID
- DCQL university requirements (withUniversityDCQL)
- Encryption enabled (encrypted)
- JWT unsecure (jwtUnsecure)
- Verification request deeplink
Expected Result: Wallet successfully retrieves the unsigned OID4VP request object as a RequestObject

Action: Wallet validates the unsigned request object structure and fields
Data:
- RequestObject containing: client_id, client_id_scheme, response_uri, response_mode, nonce
- DCQL query structure present
Expected Result: All required fields are present; client_id_scheme is 'did'; response_uri contains correct endpoint path; response_mode matches verifier configuration; nonce is non-empty
